seoTitle: Manilla vs Manly Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Manilla and Manly Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Manilla vs Manly Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Manilla and Manly Vale.
heading: Manilla vs Manly Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Manilla, New South Wales and Manly Vale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Manilla has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Manly Vale (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Manilla or Manly Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Manilla has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Manly Vale scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Manilla scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Manly Vale scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Manilla or Manly Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Manilla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
